dynamicFromEs.Los leones son los únicos felinos social: Lions are the only social big cats.
dynamicFromEs.Pueden correr a velocidades de hasta 80: They can run at speeds up to 80 km/h.
dynamicFromEs.Pueden recordar a otros elefantes durant: They can remember other elephants for decades.
dynamicFromEs.Tienen una piel gruesa y rugosa para pro: They have thick, rough skin to protect themselves from the sun.
dynamicFromEs.Tienen un corazón de 11 kg para bombear: They have an 11 kg heart to pump blood to their head.
They can sleep only 20 minutes a day.
dynamicFromEs.Tienen una lengua especializada para ras: They have a specialized tongue to tear bamboo.
They can sleep up to 16 hours a day.
dynamicFromEs.Tienen una fuerza increíble para arrastr: They have incredible strength to drag heavy prey.
dynamicFromEs.Pueden nadar hasta 6 kilómetros a la vez: They can swim up to 6 kilometers at a time.
dynamicFromEs.Pueden bucear hasta 150 metros de profun: They can dive up to 150 meters deep.
dynamicFromEs.Tienen una capa de grasa para mantenerse: They have a layer of fat to stay warm in cold water.
dynamicFromEs.Su mordida es la más fuerte entre los fe: Their bite is the strongest among big cats.
It can swim very well and hunt fish.
dynamicFromEs.Pueden usar herramientas para abrir frut: They can use tools to open hard fruits.
dynamicFromEs.Tienen una gran capacidad para aprender: They have great ability to learn and adapt.
dynamicFromEs.Tienen una gran capacidad para encontrar: They have a great ability to find water in dry lands.
dynamicFromEs.Pueden correr a velocidades de hasta 70: They can run at speeds up to 70 km/h.
dynamicFromEs.El león africano es conocido como el \"r: The African lion is known as the "king of the jungle" and is the second-largest big cat in the world. They have a unique social structure among felines, living in prides that share territory.
dynamicFromEs.El elefante africano es el mamífero terr: The African elephant is the largest land mammal on Earth. They are highly intelligent animals that show deep emotions and have extraordinary memory.
dynamicFromEs.La jirafa es el mamífero más alto del mu: The giraffe is the tallest mammal in the world, reaching up to 5.5 meters in height. Their long neck allows them to feed on leaves from tall trees, beyond the reach of other herbivores.
dynamicFromEs.Originarios de China, los pandas gigante: Native to China, giant pandas are a global symbol of wildlife conservation. They spend between 10 and 16 hours a day searching for food and eating.
dynamicFromEs.El tigre de Bengala es un depredador sol: The Bengal tiger is a solitary, nocturnal predator with unmistakable fur, whose stripes work as perfect camouflage in the jungle. They are excellent swimmers.
dynamicFromEs.Aunque no pueden volar, los pingüinos so: Although they cannot fly, penguins are exceptional swimmers, using their wings like flippers. They are known for their diving skills and social structure.
dynamicFromEs.El jaguar es un felino emblemático de Am: The jaguar is an iconic feline of the Americas, powerful and elegant, living in tropical rainforests and dense woodlands.
dynamicFromEs.Estos pequeños primates son altamente in: These small primates are highly intelligent and very active. They are famous for their ability to use rudimentary tools to open fruits or nuts.
dynamicFromEs.La cebra de Grévy es la más grande de to: Grevy's zebra is the largest of all zebra species. They are distinguished by a finer stripe pattern and large, rounded ears similar to donkeys.
